member.name: T:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket
member.summary: A ReGrid bucket

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket.Mounted
member.summary: Flag indicating if the bucket is mounted.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket.#ctor(RethinkDb.Driver.Net.IConnection,System.String,System.String,RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.BucketConfig)
member.summary: Creates a new bucket.
member.param: The database name to use. The database must exist.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket.Mount
member.summary: Mounts the bucket. Mount is necessary before using a bucket to ensure the existence of tables and indexes.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket.MountAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Mounts the bucket. Mount is necessary before using a bucket to ensure the existence of tables and indexes.

member.summary: Helper function to create an index

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket.EnsureTable(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Helper function to ensure table exists.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket.DownloadAsBytesByName(System.String,System.Int32,RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.DownloadOptions)
member.summary: Download file as byte[].
member.param: -1: The most recent revision. -2: The second most recent revision. -3: The third most recent revision. 0: The original stored file. 1: The first revision. 2: The second revision. etc...

member.summary: Download file as byte[].

member.summary: Download file as byte[] by fileId.

member.summary: Download file to a stream.

member.summary: False, download streams cannot be written to.

member.summary: Represents methods that can be used to ensure that parameter values meet expected conditions.

member.summary: Ensures that the value of a parameter is between a minimum and a maximum value.

member.summary: Ensures that the value of a parameter is equal to a comparand.

member.summary: Ensures that the value of a parameter is greater than or equal to zero.

member.summary: Ensures that the value of a parameter is greater than or equal to zero.

member.summary: Ensures that the value of a parameter is greater than zero.

member.summary: Ensures that the value of a parameter is infinite or greater than or equal to zero.

member.summary: Ensures that the value of a parameter is not null.

member.name: T:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo
member.summary: A logical view of a file in ReGrid.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.#ctor
member.summary: Construct a new FileInfo. Initial status is incomplete.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.Id
member.summary: Unique File ID in the bucket.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.ChunkSizeBytes
member.summary: The size of the chunk files.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.FileName
member.summary: The full rooted file path name.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.Length
member.summary: The full length of the file.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.FinishedAtDate
member.summary: The time the upload was finished.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.StartedAtDate
member.summary: The time the upload started.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.DeletedAtDate
member.summary: The time the file was soft-deleted

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.SHA256
member.summary: The signature of the file.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.Status
member.summary: Status of the file.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.Metadata
member.summary: Raw metadata belonging to the file.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo.MetadataAs``1
member.summary: Get Metadata as T

member.name: T:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Status
member.summary: Status flag for FileInfo

member.name: F:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Status.Incomplete
member.summary: Incomplete status indicates that the file has not finished uploading.

member.name: F:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Status.Completed
member.summary: Completed status indicates that the file was successfully uploaded.

member.name: F:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Status.Deleted
member.summary: Deleted status indicates that the file was soft-deleted.

member.name: T:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods
member.summary: File system methods for ReGrid.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.GetAllRevisions(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String)
member.summary: Gets all 'completed' file revisions for a given file. Deleted and incomplete files are excluded.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.GetAllRevisionsAsync(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all 'completed' file revisions for a given file. Deleted and incomplete files are excluded.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.GetFileInfo(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the FileInfo for a given fileId

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.GetFileInfoAsync(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the FileInfo for a given fileId

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.GetFileInfoByName(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a FileInfo for a given filename and revision. Considers only 'completed' uploads.
member.param: -1: The most recent revision. -2: The second most recent revision. -3: The third most recent revision. 0: The original stored file. 1: The first revision. 2: The second revision. etc...

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.GetFileInfoByNameAsync(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a FileInfo for a given filename and revision. Considers only 'completed' uploads.
member.param: -1: The most recent revision. -2: The second most recent revision. -3: The third most recent revision. 0: The original stored file. 1: The first revision. 2: The second revision. etc...

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.ListFilesByPrefix(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String)
member.summary: List files with a given path.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.ListFilesByPrefixAsync(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List files with a given path.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.DeleteRevision(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.Guid,RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.DeleteMode,System.Object)
member.summary: Deletes a file in the bucket.
member.param: Soft deletes are atomic. Hard are atomic on the file but not a file's chunks.
Delete durability options. See ReQL API.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.DeleteRevisionAsync(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.Guid,RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.DeleteMode,System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a file in the bucket.
member.param: Soft deletes are atomic. Hard are atomic on the file but not a file's chunks.
Delete durability options. See ReQL API.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.DeleteAllRevisions(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String,RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.DeleteMode,System.Object)
member.summary: Deletes a file and it's associated revisions. Iteratively deletes revisions for a file one by one.
member.param: Soft deletes are atomic. Hard are atomic on the file but not a file's chunks.
Delete durability options. See ReQL API.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileSystemMethods.DeleteAllRevisionsAsync(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String,RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.DeleteMode,System.Object)
member.summary: Deletes a file and it's associated revisions. Iteratively deletes revisions for a file one by one.
member.param: Soft deletes are atomic. Hard are atomic on the file but not a file's chunks.
Delete durability options. See ReQL API.

member.name: T:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FindOptions
member.summary: Represents options for a GridFS Find operation.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FindOptions.BatchSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the batch size.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FindOptions.Limit
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of documents to return.
member.value: The maximum number of documents to return.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FindOptions.MaxTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum time the server should spend on the Find.
member.value: The maximum time the server should spend on the Find.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FindOptions.NoCursorTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the cursor should not timeout.
member.value: Whether the cursor should not timeout.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FindOptions.Skip
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of documents to skip.
member.value: The number of documents to skip.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FindOptions.Sort
member.summary: Gets or sets the sort order.

member.name: T:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.GridUtility
member.summary: Low level functions for chunks and files.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.GridUtility.CleanUp(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket)
member.summary: Reclaims space from incomplete files.

member.summary: Enumerate the file system entries of a given particular status.

member.summary: Enumerate the file system entries of a given particular status.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.GridUtility.EnumerateFileEntries(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String)
member.summary: Enumerate all possible file system entries for a given filename.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.GridUtility.EnumerateFileEntriesAsync(RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.Bucket,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enumerate all possible file system entries for a given filename

member.summary: Gets the enumeration of chunks for file id

member.summary: Gets the enumeration of chunks for file id

member.summary: Get a chunk in a bucket for file id.

member.summary: Get a chunk in a bucket for file id.

member.summary: Upload Options

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: F:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.DefaultCunkSize
member.summary: The default chunk size in bytes

member.name: F:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.DefaultBatchSize
member.summary: The default batch size in bytes

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.ChunkSizeBytes
member.summary: The chunk storage size for the file chunks.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.BatchSize
member.summary: The number of chunks to buffer before writing a batch of chunks to the server.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.ChunkInsertOptions
member.summary: Chunk table insert options. Useful for specifying durability requirements.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.Metadata
member.summary: The metadata to store with the file. Stores RAW JObject (WARN: no pseudo-type conversion). See pseudo-type conversion is necessary.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.ForceFileId
member.summary: Set a predetermined (client-side generated) identifier that can used to uniquely reference the file in ReGrid. An exception will be thrown if a duplicate identifier is encountered when creating the upload session.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions.SetMetadata(System.Object)
member.summary: Sets the metadata JObject with pseudo-type conversion.

member.name: T:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream
member.summary: A ReGrid upload stream

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.#ctor(RethinkDb.Driver.Net.IConnection,System.Guid,RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.FileInfo,RethinkDb.Driver.Ast.Table,RethinkDb.Driver.Ast.Table,RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadOptions)
member.summary: Creates an UploadStream to ReGrid.
member.param: The ID of the FileInfo in the database.
An incomplete FileInfo that exists in the database waiting to be finalized.
An already namespaced Table term for FileInfo.
An already namespaced Table term for Chunk

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Abort
member.summary: Aborts an upload.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Close
member.summary: Closes the stream.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.CloseAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Async close the upload stream.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.AbortAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Aborts an upload in progress

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Write(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Write to the upload stream

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.WriteAsync(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Async write to the upload stream

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.CanRead
member.summary: False, upload streams are not readable.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.CanSeek
member.summary: False, upload streams cannot be seeked.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.CanWrite
member.summary: True, upload streams can be written to..

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Length
member.summary: The in-progress length of the upload.

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Position
member.summary: The in-progress length of the upload. Same as .

member.name: P:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Id
member.summary: The unique file id this upload stream represents.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disposes of the upload stream.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Flush
member.summary: Not supported. Does nothing.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Not supported. Does nothing.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Seek(System.Int64,System.IO.SeekOrigin)
member.summary: Not supported.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.SetLength(System.Int64)
member.summary: Not supported.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.Read(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Not supported.

member.name: M:RethinkDb.Driver.ReGrid.UploadStream.ReadAsync(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Not supported.
